titles.title: I Can Feel You Flowing Through Me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can feel you flowing through me. Holy Spirit come and fill me up come and fill me up

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Love and mercy, fill my senses. I am thirsty for your presence, Lord, come and fill me up

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord, let Your mercy wash a way all of my sin Fill me completely with Your love.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I need you, I want you I love you presence
